title: December 7
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 7''' is the 341st day (342nd in leap years) of the year. There are 24 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1910s#1915|1915]] – [[Leigh Brackett]] is born.
*[[1930s#1930|1930]] – [[Harry Lange]] is born.
*[[1930s#1930|1937]] – [[Kenneth Colley]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Eric Bauza]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 25|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 25]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 129|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 129]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Corey Vidal]] is born.
*[[1997]] – [[Crimson Empire 1|''Crimson Empire'' 1]] published.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Pursuit]]'' published.
*2004 – [[Star Wars Insider 79|''Star Wars Insider'' 79]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[Empire 38|''Empire'' 38]] published.
*[[2009]] – "[[Xim Week: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster]]" released on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Pirates... and Worse!]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 1|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 1]] published.
*[[2018]] – "[[Princess Leia vs. Darth Vader - A Fearless Leader]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Luke vs. the Death Star - X-wing Assault]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Han Solo - Galaxy's Best Smuggler]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Chewie vs. Holochess - Let the Wookiee Win]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Luke vs. Emperor Palpatine - Rise to Evil]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2019]] – [[Carol Titelman]] dies.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Vol. 2 – The Heart of Drengir]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: War of the Bounty Hunters Companion]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 207|''Star Wars Insider'' 207]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Hidden Empire 2|''Hidden Empire'' 2]] published.
<noinclude>
